description: Phase 11 scan_manifest: live manifest report must carry engine_version equal to config/engine_manifest.json's engine.version.
actual_cmd: bash -c 'a=$(jq -r .engine_version reports/n6_manifest.json 2>/dev/null); b=$(jq -r .engine.version config/engine_manifest.json 2>/dev/null); [ "$a" = "$b" ] && [ -n "$a" ] && echo 1 || echo 0'
